[[Firstpilot]] '''Rekush''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] officer and one of [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] closest aides. Rekush was the one who pointed [[Feylis Ardele]] out to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] as a possible [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] candidate.

==Behind the scenes==
Rekush was mentioned once in [[1998]]'s ''[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Peet Janes]] for [[Dark Horse Comics]], within a short character biography of Feylis Ardele. When the Handbook was reprinted in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars Omnibus|Omnibus]] [[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1'']], many of its entries were heavily truncated, and the mention of Rekush was among the material that was cut.
